title: Custom Formatter and Handler
description: Custom Formatter and Handler documents overview material for Custom Formatter and Handler in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Fromatter, and Handler, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include python, logger, custom handlers, custom formatter, and custom, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / custom, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
